question: Which of the following is true about the rainfall pattern during the year in City Q?

options.A: Rainfall was highest in August and lowest in January.
options.B: Rainfall was highest in January and lowest in August.
options.C: Rainfall stayed nearly the same throughout the year.
options.D: Rainfall increased every month from January to December.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes it appear that the series is flipped vertically, which can swap the perceived highs and lows. The correct option matches the actual data values.
